title: PM2 fails to start n8n due to syntax error
symptom: When attempting to start n8n with PM2, an error message indicates a syntax error in the n8n.cmd file.
root_cause: The PM2 process is trying to execute the n8n.cmd file as if it were a JavaScript file, leading to a syntax error. This can occur due to incorrect configuration or environment settings in PM2.
fix_steps: Create a PM2 ecosystem file to define the application settings.
Ensure the script path in the ecosystem file points to the correct n8n executable.
Start n8n using the ecosystem file with PM2.
agent_instruction: Set up a PM2 ecosystem file for n8n and start it using that configuration.
